body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Closes #168 - `report_walltime` gave incorrect percent complete when `t0` was non-zero. The fix was dividing by `tf-t0`, rather than just `tf`.
Closes #164 - Now an error is thrown when checking for equality between a number and a Time. 
Closes #159 - Now `ITime(::Int)` calculates a period if non is supplied, rather than defaulting to 1 second. This unifies the behavior with the other `ITime` constructors.

Also adds an `:(==)` method for `Itime` and `DateTime`
## To-do
